text:
Can simple iron deficiency without anemia
cause fatigue? This debate is not definitively
settled. Research in IBD does not allow
us to affirm this, but a recent meta-analysis (artificial pooling
of several studies to improve statistical power) conducted in
non-IBD patients tends to prove it for the first time.
